web.title: List of oil refineries - Wikipedia
web.description: This is a list of oil refineries. The Oil & Gas Journal publishes a worldwide list of refineries annually in a country-by-country tabulation

Please help [improve this article](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:EditPage/List_of_oil_refineries "Special:EditPage/List of oil refineries") by [adding citations to reliable sources](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed.
_Find sources:_ ["List of oil refineries"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22List+of+oil+refineries%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22List+of+oil+refineries%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22List+of+oil+refineries%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22List+of+oil+refineries%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22List+of+oil+refineries%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22List+of+oil+refineries%22&acc=on&wc=on)_(August 2025)__([Learn how and when to remove this message](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))_ | This is a **list of [oil refineries](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oil_refineries "Oil refineries")**. The _[Oil & Gas Journal](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oil_%26_Gas_Journal "Oil & Gas Journal")_ publishes a worldwide list of refineries annually in a country-by-country tabulation that includes for each refinery: location, crude oil daily processing capacity, and the size of each process unit in the refinery. For some countries, the refinery list is further categorized state-by-state. The list appears in some of their December issues.\[ _[not verified in body](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")_\] ## Global summary \[ [edit](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=List_of_oil_refineries&action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Global summary")\] As per Energy Institute and OPEC data from 2024.[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_oil_refineries#cite_note-1)[\[2\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_oil_refineries#cite_note-2) | Country | Amount (million bpd) | Percentage of global capacity | Comment | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | China | 18.48 | 17.8% | Overtook the U.S. as the world's largest refiner by capacity in 2023.\[1\] | | United States | 18.43 | 17.7% | Maintains the highest actual throughput and complex secondary processing.\[1\] | | Russia | 6.80 | 6.6% | Capacity largely focused on diesel exports; current runs impacted by sanctions.\[1\] | | India | 5.80 | 5.6% | Fastest growing regional hub; operates the massive Jamnagar complex.\[1\] | | South Korea | 3.50 | 3.4% | Highly integrated export-oriented coastal refineries.\[1\] | | Saudi Arabia | 3.29 | 3.2% | Leading refiner in the Middle East with significant joint ventures.\[2\] | | Japan | 3.10 | 3.0% | Capacity consolidating due to declining domestic demand.\[1\] | Global oil refining capacity by country (2024 estimates) ## World's largest refineries \[ [edit](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=List_of_oil_refineries&action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: World's largest refineries")\] | No. | Refinery | Company | Location | [Barrels per calendar day](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barrels_per_calendar_day "Barrels per calendar day") | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | 1 | [Jamnagar Refinery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jamnagar_Refinery "Jamnagar Refinery") | [Reliance Industries Ltd.](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reliance_Industries_Ltd.
